parameters.jsonOutput:
={{ ({
  modelA_s3_key: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.modelA_s3_key,
  modelB_s3_key: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.modelB_s3_key,
  modelB_s3_version_id: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.modelB_s3_version_id,
  mappings: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.mappings,
  pairs_source_side: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.pairs_source_side,
  data_type: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.data_type,
  default_value: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.default_value,
  aggregate: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.aggregate,
  clash_output_key: ($json.result && $json.result.output_key) || $json.output_key || '',
  clash_output_path: ($json.result && $json.result.output_path) || $json.output_path || '',
  clash_count: ($json.result && $json.result.clash_count) || $json.clash_count || 0,
  patch_output_file: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.patch_output_file,
  sort_by: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.sort_by,
  sort_order: $('Resolve Inputs').item.json.sort_order,
}) }}
